titleStmt.title: SII 9.166: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 166. (A.R. No. 45 of 1904.) ON ANOTHER SLAB BUILT INTO THE PLATFORM IN FRONT OF THE KUMARASVAMI TEMPLE AT KUDATINI, BELLARY TALUK, SAME DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Chālukya-Vikrama year 24, Pramāthin, Śrāvaṇa, śu. 5, Ādivāra corresponding to A.D. 1099 July 24, Sunday on which day the 4th tithi was current for about 2 hours in the morning. It refers itself to the reign of the Chāḷukya king Tribhuvanamalladēva and states that what was formerly a paramēśvara-datti was transferred to Bhagavatīdēvī of Koṭṭittoṇe, in the presence of Viśvarūpa-Brahmachārin, the five Vargas and Sajāvi-Chakrapāṇi.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . śrījayābhyudayaśca jayatyā
viṣkṛtaṁ viṣṇōrvārāhaṁ kṣōbhitārnnavaṁ . dakṣiṇō
nnatadamṣṭrāgraviśrāntabhuvanaṁ vapuḥ .
svasti samastabhuvanāśrayaṁ śrīprithvīvalla
bha mahārājādhirāja paramēśvaraṁ parama
bhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyā
bharaṇaṁ śrīmattribhuvanamalladēvara vijaya
rājyamuttarōttarābhivṛddhipravardhamānamācaṁ
drārkkatāraṁ saluttaṁ rājadhāni kalyāṇapurada nele
vīḍinoḷsukhasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyyuttamire
svasti samadhigatapaṁcamahāśabda bratajapaniyamahō
masaṁyukta śrīsvāmikārttikēyadēvatapōvanādhipa
tigaḷappa śrīmaddaṇḍāsanī viśvarūpabrahmacārigaḷuṁ
sthānadayduvarggamuṁ sajāvi cakrapāṇiyumirddu
śrīmaccāḷukyavikramavarṣada 24 neya pramādisaṁvatsara
da śrāvaṇa suddha 5 Ādivāradaṁdu śrīśvāmidēvara
paṭṭaṇaṁ koṭṭittoṇeya maḷigeya bhagavatīdēviya
rgge munna paramēśvaradattiyāgi paḍada vrittikoḷa
dapolaṁ hāḷahannasiṁ baḍaga tōraṇageyi navila
kōlalu mattaru 20 kōḷūra baṭṭeyiṁ baḍaga Ō
jiṣṭapannasu matta 5 koḷgala baṭṭeyiṁ baḍagaga
ḍeya polada mattaru 11 Ā polaṁ kesavarage
yyiṁ paḍuva mattaru 19 kammarada paravariyiṁ
paḍuva kōḷūra baṭṭeyiṁ teṁka mattaru 18 caṁpa
na keṟeyiṁ baḍaga kōḷūra baṭṭeyiṁ pa
ḍuva mattaru 30 jaṟagapoladiṁ teṁka karu
na māḷada Ibbaḍagada hāḷa matta
ru 11 Antumattaru nūṟapadinālku
doravaḍiya baṭṭiyiṁ teṁka tōṁṭada doḍeya ka
mma nānūṟayvattu gaṁjigeṟeyiṁ baḍagaṇa tōṁ
kammaṟa hannasu ma 12 basuriya
yalu mūḍavāgila nelasaṇa kai 5
jaṟagavolada keyi ma 20 gāṇa O 1 .
Digital edition of SII 9.166 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
